af_reduced.origin: reduced Fibonacci martingale increments dim K_N = dimA_N - dimA_{N-1} (2,3,8,21) with the trace line removed

first_obstruction: distinct-eigenvalue COUNT differs (4 vs 5) AND mult-multiset {1,3,8,21} != {1,2,8,10,12}
scale_independence: the Dirac scale sets eigenVALUES, not multiplicities -> the obstruction holds for EVERY admissible scale
verdict: exact named invariant obstruction (no unitary Xi possible)
